name: Knowledge Fragmentation
description: Critical knowledge is distributed across systems, teams, documents, and individual experts.

name: Slow Decision-Making
description: Decisions are delayed by unclear ownership, conflicting evidence, and fragmented information.

name: AI Adoption Failure
description: AI capabilities are available but are not trusted, integrated, or used consistently.

name: Operational Friction
description: Work is slowed by handoffs, repeated coordination, manual processes, and unclear workflows.

name: Data Silos
description: Teams work from disconnected systems and inconsistent information.

name: Governance Gaps
description: AI systems lack clear controls, accountability, auditability, or human oversight.

name: Low Trust
description: Users cannot confidently verify data, recommendations, or AI-generated outputs.

name: Manual Knowledge Work
description: Employees repeatedly research, summarize, reconcile, and recreate information.

name: Unclear ROI
description: Technology investment is not connected to a measurable business baseline or outcome.

name: Organizational Complexity
description: People, processes, incentives, data, and technology are poorly aligned.
